calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-033b/MECH-263 trained-OFC-head behavioural on MECH-448 demotion-enabled E3 selector, with envelope floor CALIBRATED to the behavioural bank (supersedes 485i excluded_count==0 no-op)
items.note: commitment_closure:GAP-8 evidence follow-on. Supersedes V3-EXQ-485i (FAIL/self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue 2026-06-21: MECH-448 demotion envelope admitted ALL candidates, f_eligibility_excluded_count==0, on the OFC-isolated behavioural bank's SPREAD F -> all-admit no-op, ARM_2==ARM_1, DVs never ran demoted). FIX (failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-485i_2026-06-21, behavioural-harness calibration NOT a MECH-439 F-variance rebalance): demotion-on arms CALIBRATE the absolute f_eligibility_envelope_floor per (arm,seed) to the bank's measured merit-share distribution (keep F-best top-k in [2,4] at largest share-gap; raw_scores bias-independent + constant across drives) so the MECH-448 envelope genuinely EXCLUDES; KEEP absolute share floor + dn_sigma=0.0; KEEP precond-3 (excluded_count>0 on >=2/3 seeds) a HARD readiness gate before C1/C2 (flat F -> calibration fails -> all-admit -> self-route). claim_ids=[SD-033b,MECH-263]; experiment_purpose=evidence; PROMOTES NOTHING. Dry-run: calibration engages (ARM_2 excluded=4, floor 0.125, nondegen 1/1); self-routes at toy budget on gate-1 as designed.
